title: APIResponse
description: Base response envelope for all Depositphotos API responses

timestamp.description: Response generation timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS format

type.description: Indicates whether the request succeeded or failed

errormsg.description: Human-readable error message, present only on failure

errorcode.description: Numeric error code, present only on failure

exception.description: Exception class name, present only on failure
